titleStmt.title: SII 4.1384: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1384. (A.R. No. 449 of 1893). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE INNER PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE, OUTSIDE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śraya śrīpridhuvīvallabha mahārājādhi
rāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka ravikulatilaka cōḍakulasēkhara pāṁḍyakulāṁtaka ṁdra vikramacōḍa vijayābharaṇa
rājakēsariva¨rmma pe¨rmmanaḍigalu gaṁggakāvērīpariyāṁtadharitrīpati saptamōvi[ṣṇuva¨rddhanulaina tribhuvanacakra]va¨rttiśrīkulōttuṁgacōḍadēvara prava¨rddhamānavi
jayarājyasaṁvatsa 47 śrahi di 431 ṇḍu yāvat kulācalakulaṁ pṛtivīṁ vibha¨rtti yāva cca harinābhipadmē . yāvattrayī vasati vipramukhēṣu tāvajjī yātparāṁtakaja
gannutacakrava¨rttī . Ēṣa jananāthavuriyāṁ pradhānaprasādāṁta¨rvva¨rttinyabhiṣēkamaṁṭapē divyaśayyā māsīnaḥ siṁhasthē ravau pū¨rvvapakṣē paṁcamyāṁ ca śanaiścaravārē svātīnakṣatrēṇa yā
tavati bhagavati caṁ damasi svapradhānēṣu ssava¨rnnādhirājasya vijāpanēnājanapada krētuḥ janapadaparirakṣanāya tākaniścayaḥ śilāśāsanēna samālēkhanā
va¨rddhanabrahmādhirājaṁ pratyājñāpitavāṁn tadhā samālikhyatāṁ yadhā Ekadvitricatuṣṭa ṣṭādaśaṣōḍaśān kramaśaḥ . viṁśatiṣaṣṭiśca kṣitīśayyōgāni cihnāni narē
komārakṣētrē khaṇḍikā Ēkacirōcitā dhānyaṁ vaṣṭiAṣṭādaśapū¨rvvakaṁ . tē nityaṁ dīpādhikritapauṣṭapaḥ dī pāstatastadvatō dēvabhōgaikakhaṇḍikānā
padakṛtakūpāracchēdyavanyabhūvitilaṁ śilpadhānyāni jjēyāccihnatrayapra tilamālākṛnmadyakrayakṛtāṁ kara gāṁbubhavadhānyakṣmādvitīyābdāku
tabha paṁcaciṁhnakarapradāḥ ṣaṭcihnātta dēṁbubhavō bhōgō dvitīyō jalakha cihnapradā tadvadēka la
nāgavallī
nadyaṁ bhārānyakhaṇḍāśca kramukānāṁ śatēpi ca niścaya vakṣyāma . Ikṣukṣētrekakhaṇḍikāya dvāviṁśaticihnānāṁ niśā[¨r]drakaraśōṇavat . cakryēkacakradēyāni ṣaṣṭi cā
pannasāra kuṭṭayaḥ karā¨rddhamiti niścayaḥ . Itikaraniścayamakarōdā caṁdrā¨rkkaṁ parāṁtakō nṛpatiḥ . Anya dhākṣitipatissatyādbhraṣṭō bhavatu satyam . vēṁgganānḍaina kulōttuṁggacō
ḍamaṇḍalamuna Enḍepiballeṟanaḍmu saṁvatsa 47 guśrāhi Edurēṇḍu mōdalugā śāsanamu peṭṭina paḍi [U]lparikoṭṭarabandhamaina vaḍlapuṭṭi 1 ṇṭiki mummaḍibhīmatūmuna vaḍla kha 1
puṭṭirūkaku puṭṭi 1 ṇṭiki ci 1 ḍākarēmi śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara guḍiyakhaṇḍava¨rttidiviyalu veligāṁḍakkadiyūḍlagāḍla Akhaṇḍava¨rttidiviya 1 ṇṭiki ci 3 dēvabhōgā Aṁta
rāyamunaku puṭṭi 1 ṇṭiki ci 3 śrīmaṁggali pēru 1 ṇṭiki ci 6 pōḍu 1 ṇṭiki ci 6 pesaṟu minmu Anmu lōpaina Eṇḍrunaku puṭṭi 1 ṇṭiki ci 6 mālakāri 1 ṇṭiki ci 4 kummarisāri
1 ṇṭiki ci 8 nuvvupuṭṭi 1 ṇṭiki ci 4 Erakatti 1 ṇṭiki kipaḍi ci 4 ḍākarēmi doṇḍana Aynavaṇḍina nēlaku puṭṭi 1 ṇṭiki ci 5 dēvili 1 ṇṭiki ci 5 koṟṟa Āruvuvaruvu puṭṭi 1 ṇṭiki ci 6
viḍinīraṁ baṇḍina Ayyapuṭṭi 1 ṇṭiki ci 8 jonnanēla puṭṭi 1 ṇṭiki ci 8 yētaratti 1 ṇṭiki ci 8 vaḍḍavipēru 1 ṇṭiki ci 8 kanmaripēru 1 ṇṭiki ci 8 Akkasālapēru 1 ṇṭiki ci 8 kammāsāri
pēru 1 ṇṭiki ci 8 meṭṭuvarivaṇḍinanēlaku puṭṭi 1 ṇṭiki ci 10 koḍamaṁggalipēru 1 ṇṭiki prayti ci 6 Ēru 1 ṇṭiki ci 10 cākipēru 1 ṇṭiki ci 8 gōdāvaripaḍmaṭi
puṭṭi 1 ṇṭi pōṁkamrāṁkulu 100
ku kiḍaṟalōpugā puṭṭi 1 ṇṭiki ci 8 mālamōdalipaṭṭu 1 ṇṭiki ci 5 lakaravaṭṭu 1 ṇṭiki ci 6 gā
nuṁ pannasayuna¨rddhāyamu gonaṁgalavāramu yimmā[¨rgga] nenniyu variṁ gonaṁgavāramu .
Digital edition of SII 4.1384 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
